name: Alabama Chocolate-Pecan Jumbo Christmas Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and 1/3 cup melted butter. Firmly press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch tart pan or pieplate.
2. Bake at 350°F for 6 to 8 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, cream the softened butter until smooth. Gradually add the brown sugar, beating until blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the melted chocolate, instant coffee granules, vanilla extract, flour, and chopped pecans.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool completely on a rack.
7. Before serving, pipe sweetened whipped cream onto each piece and drizzle with chocolate syrup. Garnish with cherries and/or mint if desired.
